name: Feixiao
desc: The Xianzhou Yaoqing's Merlin's Claw and one of the Seven Arbiter-Generals. Unconventional and straightforward, she exudes effortless charm.\nShe is skilled in all forms of martial arts and has honed herself into a supreme weapon. She is widely adored by Xianzhou soldiers and civilians alike as "The Vanquishing General."\nHowever, she bears the burden of the Moon Rage affliction. If she were to hunt down all the abominations in her limited lifetime — then the only enemy Feixiao has would be herself.

1.name: Skyward I Quell
1.desc: After launching "Boltsunder Blitz" or "Waraxe Skyward," additionally increases the Ultimate DMG dealt by Feixiao by an amount equal to <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of the original DMG, stacking up to <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> time(s) and lasting until the end of the Ultimate action.

2.name: Moonward I Wish
2.desc: In the Talent's effect, for every 1 instance of <u>Follow-Up ATK</u> launched by ally targets, Feixiao gains 1 point of "Flying Aureus." This effect can trigger up to <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> time(s) per turn.

10000004.name: Follow-Up ATK
10000004.desc: Unleashes an extra attack on the target. This effect is triggered automatically when requirements are met.

3.name: Starward I Bode
3.desc: Ultimate Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nBasic ATK Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>10</unbreak>.

4.name: Stormward I Hear
4.desc: The Toughness Reduction from the Talent's <u>Follow-Up ATK</u> increases by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> and, when launched, increases this unit's SPD by <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak>, lasting for <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> turn(s).

10000004.name: Follow-Up ATK
10000004.desc: Unleashes an extra attack on the target. This effect is triggered automatically when requirements are met.

5.name: Heavenward I Leap
5.desc: Skill Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nTalent Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.

6.name: Homeward I Near
6.desc: Increases the All-Type <u>RES PEN</u> of Ultimate DMG dealt by Feixiao by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>. Talent's <u>Follow-Up ATK</u> DMG is considered as Ultimate DMG at the same time, and its DMG multiplier increases by <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak>.

10000004.name: Follow-Up ATK
10000004.desc: Unleashes an extra attack on the target. This effect is triggered automatically when requirements are met.

30000005.name: RES PEN
30000005.desc: When dealing DMG, ignore a part of the enemy target's resistance to the corresponding damage type.

122001.name: Boltsunder
122001.desc: Deals Wind DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Feixiao's ATK to one designated enemy target.
122001.simple_desc: Deals minor Wind DMG to one enemy.

122002.name: Waraxe
122002.desc: Deals Wind DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Feixiao's ATK to one designated enemy target. Then, immediately launches 1 extra instance of Talent's <u>Follow-Up ATK</u> against the target.
122002.simple_desc: Deals Wind DMG to an enemy, and additionally launches Talent's <u>Follow-Up ATK</u> 1 time.

10000004.name: Follow-Up ATK
10000004.desc: Unleashes an extra attack on the target. This effect is triggered automatically when requirements are met.

122003.name: Terrasplit
122003.desc: Deals Wind DMG to one designated enemy target, up to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak></color> of Feixiao's ATK. During this time, can ignore Weakness Type to reduce the target's Toughness. When the target is not <u>Weakness Broken</u>, Feixiao's Weakness Break Efficiency increases by <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak>.\nDuring the attack, Feixiao first launches "Boltsunder Blitz" or "Waraxe Skyward" on the target, for a total of <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> time(s). At the end, deals Wind DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Feixiao's ATK to the target.
122003.simple_desc: During the Ultimate, can <color=#f29e38ff>ignore Weakness Type</color> to reduce enemy Toughness. When the target is not Weakness Broken, Feixiao's <color=#f29e38ff>Weakness Break Efficiency increases</color>.\nLaunches "Boltsunder Blitz" or "Waraxe Skyward" on one enemy <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak></color> time(s). Deals Wind DMG at the end.

10000006.name: Weakness Break State
10000006.desc: When enemy targets' Toughness is reduced to 0, they will enter the Weakness Break State, which delays their actions.

122004.name: Thunderhunt
122004.desc: Can activate Ultimate when "Flying Aureus" reaches <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> points, accumulating up to <unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak> points. Feixiao gains 1 point of "Flying Aureus" for every <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> attacks by ally targets. Feixiao's Ultimate attacks do not count towards this number.\nAfter Feixiao's teammates attack an Enemy target, Feixiao immediately launches <u>Follow-Up ATK</u> against the primary target, dealing Wind DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Feixiao's ATK. If there is no primary target available to attack, Feixiao attacks a single random enemy instead. This effect can only trigger once per turn and the trigger count resets at the start of Feixiao's turn. When using this attack, increases DMG dealt by this unit by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#5[i]%</unbreak></color>, lasting for <unbreak>#6[i]</unbreak> turn(s).
122004.simple_desc: Can activate Ultimate when "Flying Aureus" reaches <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak></color> points, accumulating up to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak></color> points. For every <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak></color> attacks by ally targets, Feixiao gains <color=#f29e38ff>"Flying Aureus"</color>.\nAfter teammates attack, Feixiao launches <color=#f29e38ff><u>Follow-Up ATK</u></color> against the primary target, dealing Wind DMG. This effect can only trigger once per turn. When using this attack, increases <color=#f29e38ff>DMG dealt by this unit</color>.

10000004.name: Follow-Up ATK
10000004.desc: Unleashes an extra attack on the target. This effect is triggered automatically when requirements are met.

122006.name: Attack
122006.desc: Attacks an enemy, and after entering combat, reduces their Toughness of the corresponding Type.

122007.name: Stormborn
122007.desc: After using Technique, enters the "Onrush" state, lasting for <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> seconds. While in "Onrush," pulls in enemies within a certain range, and increases this unit's movement speed by <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak>. After entering battle, gains <unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak> point(s) of "Flying Aureus."\nWhile in "Onrush," actively attacking will start battle with all pulled enemies. After entering battle, deals Wind DMG equal to <unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak> of Feixiao's ATK to all enemies at the start of each wave. This DMG is guaranteed to CRIT. If more than 1 enemy is pulled in, increases the multiplier of this DMG by <unbreak>#5[i]%</unbreak> for each additional enemy pulled in, up to a maximum of <unbreak>#6[i]%</unbreak>.
122007.simple_desc: Enters the "Onrush" state. Continuously pulls in enemies and increases movement speed. Gains "Flying Aureus" after entering battle.\nWhile in "Onrush," can actively attack all pulled enemies. At the start of every wave, deals Wind DMG to all enemies. This DMG is guaranteed to CRIT. <color=#f29e38ff>The more enemies are pulled in, the higher the DMG multiplier becomes</color>.

122008.name: Boltsunder Blitz
122008.desc: Deals Wind DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Feixiao's ATK to the chosen target. If the target is <u>Weakness Broken</u>, the DMG multiplier increases by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>.
122008.simple_desc: Deals minor Wind DMG to one enemy and increases the DMG multiplier against targets that are <color=#f29e38ff>Weakness Broken</color>.

10000006.name: Weakness Break State
10000006.desc: When enemy targets' Toughness is reduced to 0, they will enter the Weakness Break State, which delays their actions.

122009.name: Waraxe Skyward
122009.desc: Deals Wind DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Feixiao's ATK to the chosen target. If the target is not <u>Weakness Broken</u>, the DMG multiplier increases by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>.
122009.simple_desc: Deals minor Wind DMG to one enemy and increases the DMG multiplier against targets that are <color=#f29e38ff>not Weakness Broken</color>.

10000006.name: Weakness Break State
10000006.desc: When enemy targets' Toughness is reduced to 0, they will enter the Weakness Break State, which delays their actions.

122014.name: Terrasplit
122014.simple_desc: During the Ultimate, can <color=#f29e38ff>ignore Weakness Type</color> to reduce enemy Toughness. When the target is not Weakness Broken, Feixiao's <color=#f29e38ff>Weakness Break Efficiency increases</color>.\nLaunches "Boltsunder Blitz" or "Waraxe Skyward" on one enemy <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak></color> time(s). Deals Wind DMG at the end.

1.point_desc: When the battle starts, gains <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> point(s) of "Flying Aureus."\nAt the start of a turn, if no <u>Follow-Up ATK</u> was launched via Talent in the previous turn, then this counts as 1 toward the number of attacks required to gain "Flying Aureus."

10000004.name: Follow-Up ATK
10000004.desc: Unleashes an extra attack on the target. This effect is triggered automatically when requirements are met.

1.point_desc: When using Ultimate to deal DMG to an enemy target, it is considered as a <u>Follow-Up ATK</u>. <u>Follow-Up ATKs'</u> CRIT DMG increases by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>.

10000004.name: Follow-Up ATK
10000004.desc: Unleashes an extra attack on the target. This effect is triggered automatically when requirements are met.

1.point_desc: When using Skill, increases ATK by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>, lasting for <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> turn(s).
